mapper.select: SELECT id, year, month, monthly_quota, unit, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM carbon_monthly_quota WHERE year = #{year} ORDER BY month ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carbon_monthly_quota (year, month, monthly_quota, unit, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{year}, #{month}, #{monthlyQuota}, #{unit}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}) ON CONFLICT (year, month) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO carbon_monthly_quota (year, month, monthly_quota, unit, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{year}, #{month}, #{monthlyQuota}, #{unit}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}) ON CONFLICT (year, month) DO UPDATE SET monthly_quota = EXCLUDED.monthly_quota, update_by = EXCLUDED.update_by, update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time
